summary: Tested Event Reminder API - all 14 backend tests pass. Verified: POST /api/reminders/process (admin only), GET /api/reminders/status, GET /api/reminders/pending, reminder logic (events without convocation trigger reminders, events with convocation skipped, duplicate prevention, only coaches notified), player 403 on process endpoint, background scheduler running.

tests: POST /api/reminders/process - Admin can trigger reminder processing
GET /api/reminders/status - Admin can get all reminders
GET /api/reminders/pending - Admin gets events without convocation in next 6h
GET /api/reminders/pending - Player gets empty list (no convocation permission)
Only coaches are notified (verified 3 coaches with role=treinador)
Scheduler running every 30 minutes (verified in logs)
Processes events in 3.5h-4.5h window before start_time

critical_code_review_comments: EventReminder model correctly stores: id, event_id, team_id, reminder_type, sent_at, notified_user_ids
Reminder window is 3.5h-4.5h before event start_time (1 hour window for scheduler tolerance)
Idempotency ensured by checking existing_reminder before sending
Coaches found via team.coach_ids OR users with role treinador/treinador_adjunto in team
